event.description:
Happy new year!

The January Hadoop meetup will be held Wednesday, January 11, from 6pm to 8pm. This meetup will be hosted by CBSi at their office on 2nd St.

As usual, we will use the discussion-based "unconference" format. At the beginning of the meetup we will collaboratively construct an agenda consisting of several discussion breakout groups. All participants may propose a topic and volunteer to facilitate a discussion. All Hadoop-related topics are encouraged, and all members of the Hadoop community are welcome.

Event schedule:

6pm - Welcome 6:30pm - Introductions; start creating agenda Breakout sessions begin as soon as we're ready 8pm - Conclusion Food and refreshments will be provided courtesy of SGI, who is sponsoring this meetup.
event.title: January 2012 San Francisco Hadoop User Meetup
